description: Your youth-soccer club's schedule, teams, and dues from the terminal — with merged multi-kid agendas, conflict detection, and iCal export no dashboard gives you.

novel_features.name: This-week schedule
novel_features.description: Every game and practice for the current week across all your players' teams, in one view.

novel_features.name: Next event
novel_features.description: The single next upcoming game or practice across all your players' teams: what, when, where, home/away, opponent.

novel_features.name: Merged family agenda
novel_features.description: Both kids' separate team schedules merged into one chronological agenda over an N-day window.

novel_features.name: Conflict finder
novel_features.description: Flags time overlaps and impossible tight time-plus-location gaps between events across all your players.

novel_features.name: Away-game drive list
novel_features.description: Away games only, location-first, with field, opponent, and date — built for the carpool group chat.

novel_features.name: iCal export
novel_features.description: Emit the merged schedule as an RFC-5545 .ics file for phone-calendar subscription.

novel_features.name: Changed since last check
novel_features.description: What schedule items were added, moved, or cancelled since the last time you ran it.

novel_features.name: Outstanding balance roll-up
novel_features.description: Total money owed across all your players: registration balances plus overdue invoices, with one number.

novel_features.name: Registration deadline radar
novel_features.description: Open registration programs sorted by how soon they close, flagging ones closing within N days.
